com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface ISecurityProfileAddIn

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    SecurityProfileAddIn

    public interface ISecurityProfileAddIn
    Interface of description of an allowed add-in of a security profile of 1C:Enterprise server cluster
